hooks.command: if python3 -c "import sys" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "$CODEBUDDY_PROJECT_DIR/.codebuddy/hooks/guard-agent-tool.py" || exit 2; elif python -c "import sys" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "$CODEBUDDY_PROJECT_DIR/.codebuddy/hooks/guard-agent-tool.py" || exit 2; else echo 'CodeBuddy test-design guard: Python interpreter unavailable' >&2; exit 2; fi

if python3 -c "import sys" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "$CODEBUDDY_PROJECT_DIR/.codebuddy/hooks/record-page-probe.py" || exit 2; elif python -c "import sys" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "$CODEBUDDY_PROJECT_DIR/.codebuddy/hooks/record-page-probe.py" || exit 2; else echo 'CodeBuddy page probe recorder: Python interpreter unavailable' >&2; exit 2; fi
